channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 07:00 - 10:10 UTC

Jul 3, 07:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in racks G124B07, G124B14, G124B19, G124B21, G125B02, G125B03, G125B18, G125B21 and G125B22.

Start time : 11/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 10:10 UTC

List of concerned racks:
- Rack G124B07
- Rack G124B14
- Rack G124B19
- Rack G124B21
- Rack G125B02
- Rack G125B03
- Rack G125B18
- Rack G125B21
- Rack G125B22

Service impact : Public networks will be temporarily unavailable for 30 seconds during the maintenance for servers located in the specified racks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack BHS0817B02A maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 6, 05:00 - 05:30 UTC

Jul 15, 07:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack BHS0817B02A.

Start time : 06/08/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 06/08/2026 05:30 UTC
Service impact : If LACP is enabled, temporary bandwidth perturbations may be observed on both the public and private networks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G128B03 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 6, 02:00 - 03:00 UTC

Jul 22, 12:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack G128B03.

Start time : 06/08/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 06/08/2026 02:03 UTC
Service impact : vRack network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in rack G128B03.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SGP1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 040620B maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 01:00 - 02:00 UTC

Jul 15, 23:59 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack 040620B.

Start time : 27/07/2026 01:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 02:00 UTC
Service impact : vRack network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in the rack 040620B.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA4][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0404A01B Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 13, 11:51 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack GRA0404A01B.

Start time : 23/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX7][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R715B11 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 22, 12:26 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/07/2026 11:40 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 12:09 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack R715B11 were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R805R05 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 22, 12:19 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 22/07/2026 09:41 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 11:38 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 22, 10:08 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack R805R05.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/07/2026 09:41 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack R805R05 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
Jul 22, 11:59 UTC
Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and it will be rescheduled later.

Jul 9, 19:12 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack GRA0326B03C.

Start time : 23/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case. Additionally, public and vRacks networks might be temporarily unavailable for the servers during the maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G208A16 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 22, 06:04 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 22/07/2026 03:32 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 05:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 22, 03:40 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary issue in the rack G208A16.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/07/2026 03:32 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack G208A16 are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through vRack private network.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks G107A08 / G107A09 / G107A10 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 21, 19:41 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 11:51 UTC
End time : 21/07/2026 19:13 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 12:14 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in the racks G107A08 / G107A09 / G107A10.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 11:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks G107A08 / G107A09 / G107A10 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 12:02 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 11:51 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks G107A08 / G107A09 / G107A10 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A01 / W17A02 / W17A04 / W17A05 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 21, 08:59 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 06:45 UTC
End time : 21/07/2026 08:04 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/dt865z4yb80z

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 08:12 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The majority of servers are now operational.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are working to fix the remaining affected servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 07:19 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks W17A01 / W17A02 / W17A04 / W17A05.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 06:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks W17A01 / W17A02 / W17A04 / W17A05 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/dt865z4yb80z
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA4/6/8][Virtual Private Servers] - Some instances incident notification
item.description:
Jul 20, 15:57 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 20/07/2026 15:02 UTC
End time : 20/07/2026 15:10 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 20, 15:28 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 20/07/2026 15:10 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/07/2026 15:02 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers instances in the GRA4, GRA6 and GRA8 regions were unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access instances located on the specified regions.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Racks R827D03A/R827D03B incident notification
item.description:
Jul 19, 16:19 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on racks R827D03A and R827D03B has been resolved.

Start time : 19/07/2026 11:16 UTC
End time : 19/07/2026 16:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 19, 14:14 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in rack R827D03B are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers in rack R827D03A.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 19, 11:42 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks R827D03A and R827D03B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/07/2026 11:16 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks R827D03A and R827D03B are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 19, 11:22 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary issue in the rack R827D03A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/07/2026 11:16 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack R827D03A are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [SBG5][Dedicated Servers] - Rack SBG0504A06C maintenance notification
item.description:
Jul 19, 08:33 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our electrical infrastructure is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Jul 19, 05:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 25, 18:19 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 19/07/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 19/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
